title: Question: Can I call out to a foreign language module, via VPI, from a Verilog submodule?
body:
---


Author Name: **David Banas** (@capn-freako)
Original Redmine Message: 2815 from https://www.veripool.org



---

In thinking about how to work around this limitation whereby we're unable to use pre-Verilated *.o files to provide Verilog submodule definitions, I had the following idea:

If my original design looks like:

```
module top(*)
  sub sub1(*);
  ...
  sub subN(*);
endmodule

module sub(*)
  {Perform some computation.}
endmodule

```

Could I get away with this?:

```
module top(*)
  subVPI sub1(*);
  ...
  subVPI subN(*);
endmodule

module subVPI(*)
  {Provide a VPI-based call-out to the *.o file produced by a previous Verilator translation of the original "sub" module.}
endmodule

```
